title: Device Request - Zigbee Gate Opener Module - _TZE608_c75zqghm / TS0603
excerpt:
### Prerequisites:

- Before requesting a device addition, please ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.
- Make sure your Homey is upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.
- You need a physical example of the device.

### Device Information

- Device Name: Zigbee Gate Opener Module
- Device Model: TS0603 or QS-Zigbee-C03
- Device Description: Module for Garage Door
- Link to device image: https://s.alicdn.com/@sc04/kf/H333881ca1a0d4769a941297fd5b1c6bfu.jpg

aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue and interview data, here is the structured device information:

### Device Identification
- **Device Name**: Zigbee Gate Opener Module
- **Model**: QS-Zigbee-C03
- **Model ID**: TS0603
- **Manufacturer Name**: `_TZE608_c75zqghm`
- **Fingerprint**: `_TZE608_c75zqghm` + `TS0603`

### Hardware Profile
- **Device Type**: Router
- **Power Source**: Mains-powered (`powerSourceMains: true`)
- **Receive When Idle**: Yes (not a sleepy device)
- **Application Device ID**: 81 (Door Lock - typical for gate/garage openers)

### Cluster Analysis
| Endpoint | Input Clusters | Output Clusters |
|----------|---------------|-----------------|
| 1 | 0x0000 (Basic), 0x0003 (Identify), 0x0004 (Groups), 0x0005 (Scenes), **0xEF00 (Tuya DP)** | 0x000A (Time), 0x0019 (OTA) |
| 242 | None | 0x0021 (Green Power) |

### Tuya Protocol
- **Cluster**: 0xEF00 (61184) - Tuya proprietary DP protocol
- **Protocol**: TS0601-compatible (Tuya DP over ZCL)
- **DPs**: Not yet captured (needs pairing to see DP reports)

### Suggested Driver
- **Driver**: `garage_door` (existing driver for garage/gate openers)
- **Alternative**: `switch_1gang` (if it behaves as a relay)
- **Note**: This is a **gate opener module** - it controls a relay to open/close a gate. The `garage_door` driver is the best match.

### Capabilities Expected
- `onoff` (relay control for gate open/close)
- `garage_door` (if using garage door driver)
- `alarm_contact` (if it has position feedback)
- No battery capability (mains-powered)

### Status
- **Supported**: Yes, via `garage_door` driver
- **Fingerprint**: `_TZE608_c75zqghm` + `TS0603` needs to be added to `garage_door` driver's `driver.compose.json`
- **Action Required**: Add fingerprint to `garage_door` driver and test with physical device
